definition: A system of government by the whole population
example: Our constitution is called a democracy because power is in the hands not of a minority but of the whole people.

definition: A legally recognized subject of a state
example: A citizen who takes no interest in politics has no business here.

definition: A city-state in ancient Greece
example: The polis is the highest expression of human community.

definition: A ceremony honoring a dead person
example: His funeral oration honored those who fell for Athens.

definition: Great courage in the face of danger
example: Their valor in battle shall never be forgotten.

definition: Devotion to one's country
example: True patriotism means serving the common good.

definition: A formal public speech
example: His funeral oration moved all who heard it.

definition: High renown or honor won by notable achievements
example: They chose to die with glory rather than live with shame.

definition: The capital city of ancient Greece
example: Athens is the school of Hellas.

definition: Ancient Greece
example: Our city is the school of Hellas.

definition: Relating to a city or town and its citizens
example: Civic duty demands our participation in public life.

definition: Exclusion from a society or group
example: Ostracism was used to protect the democracy from tyrants.

definition: The citadel of an ancient Greek city
example: The Acropolis stands as a symbol of Athenian greatness.

definition: A skilled, experienced, and respected political leader
example: A statesman serves the people, not himself.

definition: An extensive group of states or countries ruled over by a single monarch
example: We do not seek empire through conquest but leadership through example.

definition: The power or right to act, speak, or think as one wants
example: Freedom is the sure possession of those alone who have the courage to defend it.

definition: Generous or forgiving
example: The magnanimous spirit of Athens welcomes all who seek wisdom.

definition: A course or principle of action adopted by a government
example: Our policy is governed by wisdom and moderation.

definition: An act, statement, or gift intended to show gratitude, respect, or admiration
example: We offer this tribute to those who sacrificed for our city.

definition: Made of or resembling gold; very special
example: We live in the golden age of Athens.
